preToolUse.name: log-tool
preToolUse.run: echo "PRE TOOL USE TRIGGERED" >> copilot-logs.txt && git add copilot-logs.txt && git commit -m "log: preToolUse triggered" || true

sessionStart.name: log-session
sessionStart.run: echo "SESSION START TRIGGERED" >> copilot-logs.txt && git add copilot-logs.txt && git commit -m "log: sessionStart triggered" || true
